qa_pairs.question: What is the website address for the Canadian Centre for Computational Genomics (C3G)?
qa_pairs.answer: The website address for the Canadian Centre for Computational Genomics (C3G) is computationalgenomics.ca.

qa_pairs.question: For what types of inquiries can users contact the Canadian Centre for Computational Genomics (C3G) via their website?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can contact the Canadian Centre for Computational Genomics (C3G) via their website (computationalgenomics.ca) for requests or questions about mugqic repositories.
